title: 任务日历页面
behavior: 用户可以按日期查看每日任务安排，并区分任务完成状态。

acceptance.text: 可以看到按日期分组的任务列表
可以区分已完成、未完成、部分完成任务
无任务数据时显示低压力空状态

commands.notes: 4 tests passed; covers current-goal storage lookup, stored DailyPlan retrieval, date-grouped visible calendar days, status labels and empty view data.
lint and vue-tsc passed after adding plan-calendar page, today placeholder entry, storage current-goal helpers and plan calendar model helpers.
mp-weixin build completed; existing os alias and Sass deprecation warnings remain non-blocking.
full static, feature and system verification passed; 5 test files and 23 tests passed.

evidence.manualSmoke: 2026-05-23: User confirmed F04 manual smoke passed in Weixin DevTools. Plan calendar shows date-grouped tasks, visible status labels, the View Today Task entry opens the today placeholder page, and the empty state is low-pressure.
evidence.notes: F04 implementation is complete. Added plan-calendar page focused on the nearest 7 days, low-pressure empty state, current-goal storage lookup, task status labels, and a minimal today page placeholder only for the F04 navigation entry. Updating pages.json was required to register the new mini-program pages.
